loan_products.name: Griha Suvidha Home Loan
loan_products.tagline: Your dream home, our lifelong support
loan_products.purpose: Purchase, construction, or renovation of residential property

age.note: Age at loan maturity must not exceed 70

loan_to_value.note: Bank funds up to 80% of property value

foir.description: Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio - total EMIs including new loan should not exceed 50% of income

loan_amount.note: Subject to property valuation and income eligibility

prepayment.fixed_rate: 2% of outstanding principal if prepaid within lock-in period

income_documents_self_employed: ITR with computation for last 3 years
Audited P&L and Balance Sheet for 3 years
Business proof (GST certificate, Shop Act license)

special_schemes: PMAY (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana) - subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG
Top-up loan available after 12 EMIs on existing home loan
Balance transfer facility from other banks

faq.q: Can I include rental income for eligibility?
faq.a: Yes, 70% of documented rental income is considered.

faq.q: Can a co-applicant who is not earning be added?
faq.a: Yes, as co-owner but only earning co-applicants improve eligibility.
Yes, but construction must begin within 2 years.

loan_products.name: Tatkal Vyaktigat Loan
loan_products.tagline: No questions asked, money in 48 hours
loan_products.purpose: Any personal financial need – medical, wedding, travel, education, debt consolidation

prepayment.penalty: 4% of outstanding if closed before 12 months, nil after 12 months

faq.q: Can I use this for medical emergency?
faq.a: Yes, no end-use restriction. Medical bills can speed up approval.

faq.q: Can I get a second personal loan?
faq.a: Only if FOIR is within limits with both loans combined.

loan_products.name: Udyog Vikas Business Loan
loan_products.tagline: Fuel your business, fuel the nation
loan_products.purpose: Working capital, machinery purchase, business expansion, inventory, GST/tax payments
eligible_for: Proprietorships, partnerships, LLPs, Private Ltd companies

business_vintage.note: Business must be profit-making for at least 2 years

gst_registered.returns_filed: Last 12 months GST returns must be filed

loan_amount.note: Above ₹25L requires collateral or CGTMSE guarantee

collateral.below_25L: CGTMSE guarantee or clean basis (credit score dependent)
collateral.above_25L: Property mortgage, machinery hypothecation, or FD pledge

business_documents: GST Certificate & last 12 months GSTR-3B returns
Business registration (Shop Act / Partnership Deed / MOA-AOA)
Last 2 years ITR with audited financials
Last 12 months current account bank statements

government_schemes_linked: CGTMSE (Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for MSMEs)

faq.q: Can a startup less than 2 years old apply?
faq.a: Startups with DPIIT recognition may apply under special startup scheme at 12-14% with 1-year vintage.
Yes, cash credit / overdraft against property or stock is available.

loan_products.name: Kisan Samridhi Loan
loan_products.tagline: Khet se khushali tak – From field to prosperity
loan_products.purpose: Crop cultivation, farm equipment, irrigation, land development, post-harvest storage, allied activities (dairy, poultry)
eligible_for: Tenant farmers / sharecroppers with land lease
Joint Liability Groups (JLGs) of small/marginal farmers

land_ownership.note: Own or leased land with valid 7/12 or satbara record

income.note: Based on land holding and cropping pattern, not salary

kcc_short_term.note: Kisan Credit Card for seasonal crop needs

loan_amount.calculation_basis: Scale of Finance per acre × cultivated area + 10% for post-harvest + 20% for maintenance

interest_subvention.note: Government of India provides 2% subvention + 3% for prompt repayment under KCC scheme

collateral.above_160000: Hypothecation of crop + land mortgage or JLG guarantee

government_schemes: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (₹6000/year direct benefit)
PMFBY – Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (crop insurance)
special_features: KCC doubles as debit card – use ATM to withdraw as needed
No need to visit bank repeatedly during crop season
Crop loan automatically qualifies for PMFBY insurance

faq.q: What if I don't own land but am a tenant farmer?
faq.a: Lease agreement + Talathi certificate qualifies. JLG formation also possible.

faq.q: Can I use KCC for buying tractor?
faq.a: No, tractor requires a separate term loan. KCC is for working capital only.
PMFBY insurance covers crop loss. Restructuring available without penalty.

loan_products.name: Vidya Shakti Education Loan
loan_products.tagline: Invest in a degree, earn for a lifetime
loan_products.purpose: Higher education in India or abroad – tuition, hostel, books, laptop, examination fees, study abroad expenses
eligible_for: Indian students admitted to recognized institutions
Students pursuing UG, PG, PhD, Diploma, Professional courses
Students going abroad (US, UK, Canada, Australia, Germany etc.)

eligibility_criteria.admission: Must have confirmed admission letter from recognized institution

academic_performance.note: At least 50% marks in qualifying exam

cibil_score.note: Based on co-borrower credit history; student's credit not primary factor

tenure.note: During moratorium, simple interest accrues (can be paid optionally)

interest_subsidy.benefit: 100% interest paid by government during moratorium period

student_documents: Mark sheets of last qualifying examination
co_borrower_documents: Last 3 months salary slips or ITR

government_schemes: PM Vidya Lakshmi Portal (single window for all education loans)
CSIS – Central Sector Interest Subsidy for EWS/LIG students
Dr. Ambedkar Central Sector Scheme (OBC/EBC students abroad)

faq.q: What if student doesn't get a job after course?
faq.a: Repayment can be extended by up to 2 years. Restructuring available on request.
Only if it's a recognized degree/diploma from UGC/AICTE/government-approved institution.

faq.q: Can loan be disbursed in installments?
faq.a: Yes, directly to the institution semester-wise or year-wise.

loan_products.name: Swarna Shakti Gold Loan
loan_products.tagline: Your gold works while you sleep
loan_products.purpose: Any purpose – agriculture, medical, business, personal emergency (fastest and simplest loan product)
eligible_for: Any individual owning gold jewellery / ornaments

gold_purity.note: Hallmarked gold preferred; tested at branch

ltv_ratio.note: RBI mandates max 75% of gold value as loan

tenure.note: Bullet repayment option (pay all at end) available

agricultural_purpose.note: If declared for agricultural use with KCC

loan_products.disbursal_timeline: Same day – within 30 minutes of gold valuation
repayment_options: Bullet repayment (principal at end, interest monthly)
Interest-only during tenure, principal at end
Overdraft against gold (pay interest only on amount used)

gold_safety.storage: Insured strong room / vault at branch
gold_safety.insurance: Gold insured at full market value against theft/loss
gold_safety.return: Gold returned immediately upon full repayment

optional: Agricultural land records (for agri-gold loan rate)

auction_policy.right_of_redemption: Borrower can pay and retrieve gold until auction hammer falls
auction_policy.surplus_returned: Any amount above outstanding loan + costs returned to borrower

faq.a: Yes, but only bank-issued/hallmarked coins up to 50 grams. No foreign coins.
Bank may request partial repayment to maintain 75% LTV. Margin call clause applies.
Yes, if gold value appreciates, you can get additional loan on same pledged gold.

common_rejection_reasons: High FOIR – too many existing EMIs
